            azimuth_deg   = 265.0,
            elevation_deg = 6.5,

            lux           = 45_000.0,

            up_color    = Std.Color.OKLCh { l = 0.92, c = 0.02, h = 240.0 },

            lux         = 18_000.0,

            azimuth_deg   = 90.0,
